betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Blast Furnace§f

§aSmelt alloys at industrial scale — the heart of early metallurgy.§f

The §bBlast Furnace§f runs on solid fuel (coal, lignite, blaze rods, lava) with an internal buffer that wastes nothing while idling. Add an §bextension§f on top for 3× the speed at no extra fuel cost.

§6Crafting§f:
Made at an anvil from stone bricks, firebrick, and copper plates.

§6Key Alloys§f:
§b• Steel§f: iron + coal (ore + flux/coke gives higher yield)
§b• Red Copper§f: copper + redstone
§b• Advanced Alloy§f: steel + red copper
§b• Neutron Reflector§f: tungsten + coal
§b• Magnetized Tungsten§f: tungsten + schrabidium nugget
§b• Technetium Steel§f: steel + TC-99 nugget
§b• PaA Alloy§f: gold plate + mixed plate
§b• Starmetal§f: saturnite + meteorite ingot

§eTip§f: Build multiple blast furnaces for serious throughput.
